creator: epopen@gmail.com
text:
Hi Maintainer.

I tried to build with WITH_DEBUG and got error with symbol as below..
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: none:100: 'max-cache-size 90%' - setting to 3521MB (out of 3912MB)
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: parser.c:950: REQUIRE(obj != ((void *)0) && obj->type->rep == &cfg_rep_uint32) failed, back trace
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #0 0x2ff759 in assertion_failed()+0x59
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #1 0x67d428 in isc_assertion_failed()+0x38
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #2 0x66adc9 in cfg_obj_asuint32()+0x69
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #3 0x32004c in configure_view()+0x19ac
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #4 0x319230 in load_configuration()+0x2c20
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #5 0x3042d5 in run_server()+0x485
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #6 0x6c7489 in dispatch()+0xc79
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #7 0x6c2f21 in run()+0x41
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: #8 0x8009f1735 in _fini()+0x80030bd59
May 26 00:22:28 dns named[11747]: exiting (due to assertion failure)

Look like configure option issue.
Next, I shrank configure file (/usr/local/etc/namedb/named.conf) as below, and got same error.
    options {
       directory   "/usr/local/etc/namedb/working";
       pid-file    "/var/run/named/pid";
    }; 

Next, comment out source code (line 4597~4618 @ bin/named/server.c, base: bind916-9.16.3_2) as below
    /*                                                                              obj = NULL;
    result = named_config_get(maps, "fetches-per-server", &obj);
    INSIST(result == ISC_R_SUCCESS);
    obj2 = cfg_tuple_get(obj, "fetches");
    fps = cfg_obj_asuint32(obj2);
    obj2 = cfg_tuple_get(obj, "response");
    if (!cfg_obj_isvoid(obj2)) {
        const char *resp = cfg_obj_asstring(obj2);
        isc_result_t r = DNS_R_SERVFAIL;

        if (strcasecmp(resp, "drop") == 0) {
            r = DNS_R_DROP;
        } else if (strcasecmp(resp, "fail") == 0) {
            r = DNS_R_SERVFAIL;
        } else {
            INSIST(0);
            ISC_UNREACHABLE();
        }

        dns_resolver_setquotaresponse(view->resolver,
                          dns_quotatype_server, r);
    }
   */

Bind start successful and work fine as below.
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: starting BIND 9.16.3 (Stable Release) <id:5ea41c1>
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: running on FreeBSD amd64 12.1-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p3 #9 r335865M: Thu Apr 16 13:18:03 CST 2020     root@epopen.com:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/EpopenKernel
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: built with '--disable-linux-caps' '--localstatedir=/var' '--sysconfdir=/usr/local/etc/namedb' '--with-dlopen=yes' '--with-libxml2' '--with-openssl=/usr/local' '--with-readline=-L/usr/local/lib -ledit' '--with-dlz-filesystem=yes' '--enable-dnstap' '--disable-fixed-rrset' '--disable-geoip' '--without-maxminddb' '--with-gssapi=/usr/local' 'CFLAGS=-I/usr/local/include/heimdal -O2 -pipe -march=core2 -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing ' 'LDFLAGS=-L/usr/local/lib/heimdal -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/heimdal:/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -ljson-c -fstack-protector-strong ' 'LIBS=-lkrb5 -lgssapi -L/usr/local/lib' 'KRB5CONFIG=/usr/local/bin/krb5-config' '--with-libidn2=/usr/local' '--with-json-c' '--enable-largefile' '--with-lmdb=/usr/local' '--disable-native-pkcs11' '--without-python' '--disable-querytrace' 'STD_CDEFINES=-DDIG_SIGCHASE=1' '--enable-tcp-fastopen' '--with-tuning=default' '--disable-symtable' '--prefix=/usr/local' '--mandir=/usr/local/man' '--infodir=/usr/local/share/info/' '--build=amd64-portbld-freebsd12.1' 'build_alias=amd64-portbld-freebsd12.1' 'CC=cc' 'CPPFLAGS=-DLIBICONV_PLUG -isystem /usr/local/include' 'CPP=cpp' 'PKG_CONFIG=pkgconf'
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: running as: named -u bind -c /usr/local/etc/namedb/named.conf
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: compiled by CLANG 4.2.1 Compatible FreeBSD Clang 8.0.1 (tags/RELEASE_801/final 366581)

May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: listening on IPv6 interface lo0, ::1#53

May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: none:100: 'max-cache-size 90%' - setting to 3521MB (out of 3912MB)
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: obtaining root key for view _default from '/usr/local/etc/namedb/bind.keys'
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: set up managed keys zone for view _default, file 'managed-keys.bind'
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: none:100: 'max-cache-size 90%' - setting to 3521MB (out of 3912MB)
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: command channel listening on ::#953
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: managed-keys-zone: loaded serial 2

....
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: zone f.e.f.ip6.arpa/IN: loaded serial 42
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: all zones loaded
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: running
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: zone 1.4.9.1.0.8.4.a.1.1.0.b.1.0.0.2.ip6.arpa/IN: sending notifies (serial 2018060801)
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: zone 86.117.122.in-addr.arpa/IN: sending notifies (serial 2015110901)
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: resolver priming query complete
May 26 18:08:34 dns named[87177]: managed-keys-zone: Key 20326 for zone . is now trusted (acceptance timer complete)

It is root cause look like but I don't detail right now.
Thanks a lot.
